title: Lu's More Bosses [LMB]  (Forge / Neoforge)
description: U want more bosses? We have more bosses
body:
Our version in Curse Forge can be found [here](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/lmb) We're on YouTube too. JorgeAMM : [here](https://youtube.com/@terencioanalisador3000?si=Xl0i9t6kq0Pv-xk1)
That LucaTube : [here](https://www.youtube.com/@AqueleLucaTube) 📦 About the Mod Okay, let's get started! This mod was created to add the most varied challenges a Minecraft world could face—including new bosses and mobs across all dimensions, plus some extra features. 🛠️ Team The team is small, okay? I handle the mobs, and my bro takes care of the structures. Updates aren’t super frequent... BUT they always bring plenty of cool content! 🐞 Bugs & Suggestions Found a bug or have a cool idea? Comment here! I’ll take a look and respond when possible. Feedback is life! You can also send it to our Discord server. Discord 🔧 Compatibility The mod is currently available for NeoForge and Forge, and I don't intend to bring it to Fabric. 📅 Updates Updates are released sporadically, so stay tuned to our social media! Lists of bosses and mini bosses
Spoiler COPPER MONSTROSITY ![The Copper Monstrosity](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/9cf66b7d91e45bc172cbd89237159c3989cb9e04.png) It has 800 health points and 50 armor points ATTACKS: Slam: The Mosntrosity hit the ground and deal cone shaped damage - 22  area dmg Wind Burst: It shoots 2 wind burst on it target - 10 dmg(one) Punch: A normal meele attack - 15 dmg Slap: A powerfull slap, applies knockback 5 -15 dmg Ground Smash: The Mosntrosity hit the ground and generate a medium shockwave - 12  area dmg(close) HOW I CAN FIND IT? U cand find the Monstrosity in the Engineers Workshop, a underground structure, u can localizate it with a Monstrosity Eye SLAGTIO THE MIGHTY ![Slagtio the Mighty](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/17da7bcf75e8c04980c0fc859478cb11ddcbfde2.png) It has 200 health points and 12 armor points ATTACKS: Cut: Slagtio do a clean cut in one target - 12 dmg Down Cut: Slagtio do a clean cut in one target but also makes a short dash - 12 dmg Slash: Slagtio do a lateral slash, in cone shape and do a short dash - 12 area dmg Slash 360: Slasgtio do a 360 slash, and do a short dash - 12 area dmg Thrust: Slagtio charges and performs a medium-to-long-range thrust; the thrust disables the use of shields and opens breachs in armor - 12 dmg HOW I CAN FIND HIM? U can find Slagtio sleeping in his own sanctuary,is better u craft a Broken Idol because you need it to wake up him, The O Sanctuary can be localizated using a Old Eye  ENDER THE EYE OF THE CHAOS ![Ender The Eye Of The Chaos](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/a4kSd2gD/images/b4a6542bd7826f8f8a652f73edd6b8f8308d74e5_350.webp) It has 800 health points and 20 armor points ATTACKS: Slam: Ender hit the ground in a line shape - 25  area dmg Laser: Ender fires a powerfull energy beam - 8 = 10% target max health Uppercut: A normal uppercut - 12 dmg Punch A: A normal punch - 15 dmg Punch B: A strong punch - 16 dmg with knockback Grab: Ender tries to grab the closer enemy to himself - 0 dmg Throw: First he attempts a uppercut, if it connects he performs a spinning attack - 24 dmg(total) Block: Ender denny any attack - 0 dmg Teleport: Ender perform a quick teleport to change him position - 0 dmg HOW I CAN FIND IT? You can find Ender in his Eye form in the center of his temple in The End, talk to him and challenge him to a fight. You can locate the Eye Temple by creating a Great Eye
Thanks to everyone who gave suggestions for the mod, especially Jorge; without him, the mod would no longer exist.
